title: Assertion fault when deleting a table out from under a SELECT
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE t2(id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY, name VARCHAR, value DOUBLE, created_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP);
INSERT INTO t2(name, value) VALUES('item1', 10.5), ('item2', NULL), ('item3', 20.0);
CREATE TABLE t3(ref_id INTEGER, description VARCHAR, FOREIGN KEY(ref_id) REFERENCES t2(id));
SELECT t2.id, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM t3 WHERE t3.ref_id = t2.id) AS count_ref, t2.value FROM t2 ORDER BY t2.value DESC;
key_bug_features: Deleting a table during a SELECT statement
